hooks.command: FP=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FP" in */ideas/initial-ideas.md) cd /Users/tetsuya.nitta/github/aidd-training-materials && git add ideas/initial-ideas.md && if ! git diff --cached --quiet -- ideas/initial-ideas.md; then git commit -m 'docs: update initial-ideas' && git push origin main; fi ;; esac; true
